dimensions.evidence: Diff adds GradeNA constant (-1) and 'N/A' mapping in dimension.go, and Unsupported bool field in record.go — exactly the two deliverables the plan named.
All 4 files touched are under internal/domain; dimension.go and record.go were the plan's targets, and the two _test.go files add only tests for the new additions — no unrelated churn.

New tests genuinely verify GradeNA value (-1), String() output 'N/A', and Unsupported default/explicit behavior; no existing test was deleted, weakened, or hard-coded — the flaky report/TestGenerateSite_LargeScale is a pre-existing unrelated timeout.

Both changes are purely additive — GradeNA=-1 is outside valid score ranges and won't collide with existing GradeFromScore; Unsupported bool defaults to false preserving all existing behaviour; no doc-comment/code mismatch.
